title: TraditionalCraft
body:
TraditionalCraft is mod about ancient technology. The current content includes:
### 🧨fireworks & firecrackers:
Delve underground to mine Glow Gunpowder Ore. The Glow Gunpowder obtained can be crafted into a variety of fireworks and firecrackers. Use them to aid in combat, or for pure aesthetic enjoyment.

![firework](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21703f042994e532f5cb640a3c02644652591543_0.webp)

### 🌿 Medicinals & Pill Crafting:
Search for medicinals all over the world,and crafting various pill in the Medicine Pot:
Craft a Medicine Pot and place it on the ground,add water inside,fill it with 5 medicinals,Medicine Pot can refine pills with varying effects based on the different medicinals used.for example,lophatherum provides fire protection,ass glue provides healing and so on(More effects can be viewed in the Medicine Pot JEI).If the same type of medicinals is added,durations will be accumulated.

Besides, here has a few special medicinals,these medicinals themselves do not have direct effects, but they possess some other properties:

Snow lotus:
If there are identical medicinals, the approach will no longer be to combine their efficacy durations, but rather to enhance their efficacy levels.(2 identical medicinal herbs, Effect Level +1; 4 identical medicinal herbs, Effect Level +2)

Licorice slice:
Duration of efficacy is multiplied by 1.5.

Placenta:
Each type of medicinals has a 50% chance to increase its level by one.

( 2 ass glues + golden carrot + blaze powder + snow lotus = pill(heal Ⅱ,night vision Ⅰ,strength Ⅰ) )

![pill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fb1865e8b5c7703566458ed4d543c2c40c52878_0.webp)

### 👾 Bosses:
There are 2 bosses available for challenge:
- Boss Nien(Year Beast)
  
  ![Nien](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/347f1b706dce5cbdf48082b2fa4122b19ea5681a.png)
  
  At midnight(time set 18000)，light the fire_flower, silver_light, gold_light, and landred while a villager is nearby，wait a moment,The Nien will be coming.Nien is a monster that emits flames and can cause explosions,pay attention to strengthening flame protection and explosion protection.After the victory,redpacket will rain from the sky,you can open it to obtain some materials,or throw to the villagers,if the villagers have occupations,he will also throw the his merchandise at you.
  
- Boss GoatEmperor
  
  ![GoatEmperor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/936221ab6f762a4d5c6df7bfc4aad9801e12d15e.png)
  
  Make a weird_pill and feed it to the goat,ten seconds later,goat will be transformed into GoatEmperor.GoatEmperor is a monster capable of charging, firing magic balls, and summoning llamas and goats.Keep moving to prevent being hit by magic balls and charging.After the victory,It will drop 5 goatbags,you can open it to obtain some medicinals,or obtain a goat ball with a small probability.
